records.m_Talk_FRA: Hi, everyone. It's me, Miya! I'm here today to introduce Counters Legacy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, this outfit is, um... a clause that Garam secretly included in the contract...

records.m_Talk_FRA: So, this outfit is, um... a clause that Garam secretly included in the contract...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-actually, I just wanted to put on something nice since I'm the star of the show today...!94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: To commemorate the HRT Berry collaboration, I've planned a quest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To commemorate the HRT Berry collaboration, I've planned a quest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To commemorate the HRT Berry collaboration, I've planned a quest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's called! Miya's Merchandise Collecting Quest! Isn't it simple?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's called! Miya's Merchandise Collecting Quest! Isn't it simple?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's called! Miya's Merchandise Collecting Quest! Isn't it simple?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All you have to do is obtain Miya's poster from the area marked on the map.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All you have to do is obtain Miya's poster from the area marked on the map.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All you have to do is obtain Miya's poster from the area marked on the map.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG:
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Miya's poster????
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> What kind of photo is it???

<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Miya's poster????
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> What kind of photo is it???

W-what kind of photo? It's what I'm wearing right
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Check out our channel for more details...!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Check out our channel for more details...!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Check out our channel for more details...!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shall we...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shall we...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shall we...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... That little kid. She's not using me for that sponsorship with HRT Berry, is she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... That little kid. She's not using me for that sponsorship with HRT Berry, is she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... That little kid. She's not using me for that sponsorship with HRT Berry, is she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're, uh... Bomi from HRT Berry, right? Is this where I get the quest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're, uh... Bomi from HRT Berry, right? Is this where I get the quest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're, uh... Bomi from HRT Berry, right? Is this where I get the quest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's a fetch quest, then I'll decline. Give me the hardest one you've got!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's a fetch quest, then I'll decline. Give me the hardest one you've got!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's a fetch quest, then I'll decline. Give me the hardest one you've got!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a student of the Academy? It's great how energetic you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a student of the Academy? It's great how energetic you are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a student of the Academy? It's great how energetic you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But be careful not to fall asleep while pushing yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But be careful not to fall asleep while pushing yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But be careful not to fall asleep while pushing yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I marked the location on your map. Happy hunting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I marked the location on your map. Happy hunting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I marked the location on your map. Happy hunting!

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Find Miya's Poster"...? This is the quest...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Find Miya's Poster"...? This is the quest...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Find Miya's Poster"...? This is the quest...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you kidding me right now? Take this back and give me something harder!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you kidding me right now? Take this back and give me something harder!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you kidding me right now? Take this back and give me something harder!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't underestimate this quest. The competition is already fierce.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't underestimate this quest. The competition is already fierce.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't underestimate this quest. The competition is already fierce.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I met a <color=#ffd34c>gunslinger girl</color> right before you, and she had a ton of underlings with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I met a <color=#ffd34c>gunslinger girl</color> right before you, and she had a ton of underlings with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I met a <color=#ffd34c>gunslinger girl</color> right before you, and she had a ton of underlings with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure she'll be a formidable opponent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure she'll be a formidable opponent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure she'll be a formidable opponent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I'm already used to a bloody battlefield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I'm already used to a bloody battlefield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I'm already used to a bloody battlefield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-didn't you say you were a student...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-didn't you say you were a student...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-didn't you say you were a student...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Scoff* A ton of underlings? Numbers mean nothing to me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Scoff* A ton of underlings? Numbers mean nothing to me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Scoff* A ton of underlings? Numbers mean nothing to me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... why are you all following me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... why are you all following me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... why are you all following me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he. We want to be in your party again, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he. We want to be in your party again, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he. We want to be in your party again, Naielle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We won't get in your way. We're just looking for someone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We won't get in your way. We're just looking for someone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We won't get in your way. We're just looking for someone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looking for someone? Who?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looking for someone? Who?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looking for someone? Who?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>best hero</color> that was acclaimed by Ms. Chairwoman!!!94p94p94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>best hero</color> that was acclaimed by Ms. Chairwoman!!!94p94p94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>best hero</color> that was acclaimed by Ms. Chairwoman!!!94p94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a member of the Special Hero Class, we can't let an opportunity like this go to waste!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a member of the Special Hero Class, we can't let an opportunity like this go to waste!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a member of the Special Hero Class, we can't let an opportunity like this go to waste!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh. Who dares to claim to be the best when I'm here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh. Who dares to claim to be the best when I'm here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh. Who dares to claim to be the best when I'm here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to find out who this person is. Do you have any more info?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to find out who this person is. Do you have any more info?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to find out who this person is. Do you have any more info?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We only know that this person wears a mask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We only know that this person wears a mask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We only know that this person wears a mask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the hero saved Ms. Chairwoman, so he must be super strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the hero saved Ms. Chairwoman, so he must be super strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the hero saved Ms. Chairwoman, so he must be super strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll never find this person with that little information!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll never find this person with that little information!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll never find this person with that little information!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still... It would be worth finding out how strong this person actually is if I meet him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still... It would be worth finding out how strong this person actually is if I meet him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still... It would be worth finding out how strong this person actually is if I meet him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to fight the hero? What a villain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to fight the hero? What a villain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to fight the hero? What a villain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! That's not true, right? You wouldn't fight a hero!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! That's not true, right? You wouldn't fight a hero!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! That's not true, right? You wouldn't fight a hero!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could you, Naielle...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could you, Naielle...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could you, Naielle...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it! He wouldn't be the best if he were to lose to me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it! He wouldn't be the best if he were to lose to me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it! He wouldn't be the best if he were to lose to me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Follow me if you want to find this hero or whatever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Follow me if you want to find this hero or whatever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Follow me if you want to find this hero or whatever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Game recognizes game, so being with me will increase your chances of meeting him, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Game recognizes game, so being with me will increase your chances of meeting him, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Game recognizes game, so being with me will increase your chances of meeting him, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I really wish you'd choose a lane. Either be grumpy or be kind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I really wish you'd choose a lane. Either be grumpy or be kind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I really wish you'd choose a lane. Either be grumpy or be kind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he, I agree. Personally, I wish you'd choose to be kind!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he, I agree. Personally, I wish you'd choose to be kind!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he, I agree. Personally, I wish you'd choose to be kind!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I just ditch them...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I just ditch them...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I just ditch them...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, um... We're at the scene right now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, um... We're at the scene right now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, um... We're at the scene right now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't ASMR. I'm just talking real quietly to not get noticed by monsters...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't ASMR. I'm just talking real quietly to not get noticed by monsters...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't ASMR. I'm just talking real quietly to not get noticed by monsters...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he, I guess I got immersed in this world... I feel like I'm really in the Counterside...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he, I guess I got immersed in this world... I feel like I'm really in the Counterside...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he, I guess I got immersed in this world... I feel like I'm really in the Counterside...

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah. It's the duty of the strong to aid those in danger.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah. It's the duty of the strong to aid those in danger.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah. It's the duty of the strong to aid those in danger.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Live and die by loyalty! We are the <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Riders Blood Alliance</color>!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Live and die by loyalty! We are the <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Riders Blood Alliance</color>!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Live and die by loyalty! We are the <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Riders Blood Alliance</color>!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. We may not be the strongest in the real world, but we're the strongest party in this game!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. We may not be the strongest in the real world, but we're the strongest party in this game!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. We may not be the strongest in the real world, but we're the strongest party in this game!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can let the grunts do all the hard work while we relax and just watch over them...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can let the grunts do all the hard work while we relax and just watch over them...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can let the grunts do all the hard work while we relax and just watch over them...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think our dreams finally came true!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think our dreams finally came true!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think our dreams finally came true!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, when else would we be able to boss people around like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, when else would we be able to boss people around like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, when else would we be able to boss people around like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's with Lady Xien's money...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's with Lady Xien's money...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's with Lady Xien's money...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! A strong-looking party just appeared!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! A strong-looking party just appeared!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! A strong-looking party just appeared!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, "Blood Alliance"? They're giving off scary vibes...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, "Blood Alliance"? They're giving off scary vibes...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, "Blood Alliance"? They're giving off scary vibes...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... You're Free Riders, right? Would you be willing to participate in an interview?
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... You're Free Riders, right? Would you be willing to participate in an interview?
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... You're Free Riders, right? Would you be willing to participate in an interview?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are called Freedom Riders. When will people start saying our name right...?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are called Freedom Riders. When will people start saying our name right...?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are called Freedom Riders. When will people start saying our name right...?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, you'd better be careful with your words next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, you'd better be careful with your words next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, you'd better be careful with your words next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. So what are you curious to know about us, "Freedom" Riders?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. So what are you curious to know about us, "Freedom" Riders?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. So what are you curious to know about us, "Freedom" Riders?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone here in the same party?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone here in the same party?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone here in the same party?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct! It wouldn't be Blood Alliance with only a few elite members, would it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct! It wouldn't be Blood Alliance with only a few elite members, would it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct! It wouldn't be Blood Alliance with only a few elite members, would it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to be scared of the term "Blood Alliance". We're just a big family united by loyalty!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to be scared of the term "Blood Alliance". We're just a big family united by loyalty!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to be scared of the term "Blood Alliance". We're just a big family united by loyalty!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha ha! I'm a huge fan of yours, Miya!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha ha! I'm a huge fan of yours, Miya!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha ha! I'm a huge fan of yours, Miya!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We haven't found the poster yet, but I'm sure we'll find it in no time with this many people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We haven't found the poster yet, but I'm sure we'll find it in no time with this many people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We haven't found the poster yet, but I'm sure we'll find it in no time with this many people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And, um... could I get your autograph...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And, um... could I get your autograph...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And, um... could I get your autograph...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... I think you'll be a nuisance to the others if you block this area off as a group.
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... I think you'll be a nuisance to the others if you block this area off as a group.
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... I think you'll be a nuisance to the others if you block this area off as a group.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? But it's not against any rules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? But it's not against any rules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? But it's not against any rules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you can't beat them, join them. Isn't that right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you can't beat them, join them. Isn't that right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you can't beat them, join them. Isn't that right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you interested in joining our clan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you interested in joining our clan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you interested in joining our clan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! No, I'm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! No, I'm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! No, I'm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You use grandiose words like Blood Alliance, but in the end, you're just bribing others to join.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You use grandiose words like Blood Alliance, but in the end, you're just bribing others to join.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You use grandiose words like Blood Alliance, but in the end, you're just bribing others to join.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you lack confidence in your skills? What a bunch of losers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you lack confidence in your skills? What a bunch of losers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you lack confidence in your skills? What a bunch of losers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! A challenger just appeared!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! A challenger just appeared!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! A challenger just appeared!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-bribing?! Don't talk like we're committing some kind of crime!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-bribing?! Don't talk like we're committing some kind of crime!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-bribing?! Don't talk like we're committing some kind of crime!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's so bad about having comrades? It's not against the rules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's so bad about having comrades? It's not against the rules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's so bad about having comrades? It's not against the rules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-of course, it was only possible through Lady Xien's money... but we're not ashamed of anything!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-of course, it was only possible through Lady Xien's money... but we're not ashamed of anything!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course, it was only possible through Lady Xien's money... but we're not ashamed of anything!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. So, you're saying that you're not going to lift a finger, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. So, you're saying that you're not going to lift a finger, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. So, you're saying that you're not going to lift a finger, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you know that only weaklings try to win with quantity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you know that only weaklings try to win with quantity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you know that only weaklings try to win with quantity?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How naive. Seems like you're all students of the Academy...94p94p94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: How naive. Seems like you're all students of the Academy...94p94p94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: How naive. Seems like you're all students of the Academy...94p94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: While you were all studying comfortably with the Administration's support, we went through all kinds of hardships!
records.m_Talk_DEU: While you were all studying comfortably with the Administration's support, we went through all kinds of hardships!
records.m_Talk_FRA: While you were all studying comfortably with the Administration's support, we went through all kinds of hardships!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The level of experience we have is different!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The level of experience we have is different!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The level of experience we have is different!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Experience, eh? Then, wanna make a bet on who completes the quest first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Experience, eh? Then, wanna make a bet on who completes the quest first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Experience, eh? Then, wanna make a bet on who completes the quest first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think that will provoke us? Why would we want to make a bet with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think that will provoke us? Why would we want to make a bet with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think that will provoke us? Why would we want to make a bet with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I accept your challenge!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I accept your challenge!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I accept your challenge!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whaaat?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whaaat?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whaaat?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Young students trying to overcome an impossible fight... It sparks a flame in my heart...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Young students trying to overcome an impossible fight... It sparks a flame in my heart...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Young students trying to overcome an impossible fight... It sparks a flame in my heart...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah... Finally! I've wanted a heart-pounding battle all this time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah... Finally! I've wanted a heart-pounding battle all this time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah... Finally! I've wanted a heart-pounding battle all this time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't think for a second that I'll go easy on you. The Blood Alliance won't tolerate anyone who messes with our comrades!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't think for a second that I'll go easy on you. The Blood Alliance won't tolerate anyone who messes with our comrades!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't think for a second that I'll go easy on you. The Blood Alliance won't tolerate anyone who messes with our comrades!

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-do whatever you want! We'll be way in the back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-do whatever you want! We'll be way in the back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-do whatever you want! We'll be way in the back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah! How can the officials of our alliance stay in the rear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah! How can the officials of our alliance stay in the rear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah! How can the officials of our alliance stay in the rear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The three of us will take the lead! Everyone, follow me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The three of us will take the lead! Everyone, follow me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The three of us will take the lead! Everyone, follow me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oooh...! Lady Xien!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oooh...! Lady Xien!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oooh...! Lady Xien!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do we always end up in situations like this?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do we always end up in situations like this?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do we always end up in situations like this?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Look at those third-rate villains acting all tough!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Look at those third-rate villains acting all tough!

root.m_Talk_DEU: It's called! Miya's Merchandise Collecting Quest! Isn't it simple?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's called! Miya's Merchandise Collecting Quest! Isn't it simple?

root.m_Talk_DEU: All you have to do is obtain Miya's poster from the area marked on the map.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All you have to do is obtain Miya's poster from the area marked on the map.

<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Miya's poster????

root.m_Talk_ENG: Check out our channel for more details...!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Check out our channel for more details...!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Check out our channel for more details...!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shall we...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shall we...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shall we...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... That little kid. She's not using me for that sponsorship with HRT Berry, is she?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... That little kid. She's not using me for that sponsorship with HRT Berry, is she?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... That little kid. She's not using me for that sponsorship with HRT Berry, is she?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're, uh... Bomi from HRT Berry, right? Is this where I get the quest?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're, uh... Bomi from HRT Berry, right? Is this where I get the quest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're, uh... Bomi from HRT Berry, right? Is this where I get the quest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's a fetch quest, then I'll decline. Give me the hardest one you've got!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's a fetch quest, then I'll decline. Give me the hardest one you've got!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's a fetch quest, then I'll decline. Give me the hardest one you've got!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you a student of the Academy? It's great how energetic you are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you a student of the Academy? It's great how energetic you are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you a student of the Academy? It's great how energetic you are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But be careful not to fall asleep while pushing yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But be careful not to fall asleep while pushing yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But be careful not to fall asleep while pushing yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I marked the location on your map. Happy hunting!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I marked the location on your map. Happy hunting!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I marked the location on your map. Happy hunting!

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Find Miya's Poster"...? This is the quest...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Find Miya's Poster"...? This is the quest...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Find Miya's Poster"...? This is the quest...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you kidding me right now? Take this back and give me something harder!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you kidding me right now? Take this back and give me something harder!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you kidding me right now? Take this back and give me something harder!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't underestimate this quest. The competition is already fierce.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't underestimate this quest. The competition is already fierce.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't underestimate this quest. The competition is already fierce.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I met a <color=#ffd34c>gunslinger girl</color> right before you, and she had a ton of underlings with her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I met a <color=#ffd34c>gunslinger girl</color> right before you, and she had a ton of underlings with her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I met a <color=#ffd34c>gunslinger girl</color> right before you, and she had a ton of underlings with her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure she'll be a formidable opponent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure she'll be a formidable opponent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure she'll be a formidable opponent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I'm already used to a bloody battlefield.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I'm already used to a bloody battlefield.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I'm already used to a bloody battlefield.

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-didn't you say you were a student...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-didn't you say you were a student...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-didn't you say you were a student...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Scoff* A ton of underlings? Numbers mean nothing to me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Scoff* A ton of underlings? Numbers mean nothing to me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Scoff* A ton of underlings? Numbers mean nothing to me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... why are you all following me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... why are you all following me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... why are you all following me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he. We want to be in your party again, Naielle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he. We want to be in your party again, Naielle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he. We want to be in your party again, Naielle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We won't get in your way. We're just looking for someone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We won't get in your way. We're just looking for someone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We won't get in your way. We're just looking for someone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looking for someone? Who?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looking for someone? Who?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looking for someone? Who?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>best hero</color> that was acclaimed by Ms. Chairwoman!!!94p94p94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>best hero</color> that was acclaimed by Ms. Chairwoman!!!94p94p94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>best hero</color> that was acclaimed by Ms. Chairwoman!!!94p94p94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a member of the Special Hero Class, we can't let an opportunity like this go to waste!
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a member of the Special Hero Class, we can't let an opportunity like this go to waste!
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a member of the Special Hero Class, we can't let an opportunity like this go to waste!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh. Who dares to claim to be the best when I'm here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh. Who dares to claim to be the best when I'm here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh. Who dares to claim to be the best when I'm here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to find out who this person is. Do you have any more info?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to find out who this person is. Do you have any more info?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to find out who this person is. Do you have any more info?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We only know that this person wears a mask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We only know that this person wears a mask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We only know that this person wears a mask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the hero saved Ms. Chairwoman, so he must be super strong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the hero saved Ms. Chairwoman, so he must be super strong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the hero saved Ms. Chairwoman, so he must be super strong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll never find this person with that little information!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll never find this person with that little information!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll never find this person with that little information!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still... It would be worth finding out how strong this person actually is if I meet him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still... It would be worth finding out how strong this person actually is if I meet him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still... It would be worth finding out how strong this person actually is if I meet him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to fight the hero? What a villain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to fight the hero? What a villain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to fight the hero? What a villain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! That's not true, right? You wouldn't fight a hero!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! That's not true, right? You wouldn't fight a hero!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! That's not true, right? You wouldn't fight a hero!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How could you, Naielle...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How could you, Naielle...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How could you, Naielle...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it! He wouldn't be the best if he were to lose to me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it! He wouldn't be the best if he were to lose to me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it! He wouldn't be the best if he were to lose to me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Follow me if you want to find this hero or whatever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Follow me if you want to find this hero or whatever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Follow me if you want to find this hero or whatever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Game recognizes game, so being with me will increase your chances of meeting him, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Game recognizes game, so being with me will increase your chances of meeting him, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Game recognizes game, so being with me will increase your chances of meeting him, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I really wish you'd choose a lane. Either be grumpy or be kind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I really wish you'd choose a lane. Either be grumpy or be kind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I really wish you'd choose a lane. Either be grumpy or be kind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he, I agree. Personally, I wish you'd choose to be kind!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he, I agree. Personally, I wish you'd choose to be kind!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he, I agree. Personally, I wish you'd choose to be kind!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should I just ditch them...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should I just ditch them...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should I just ditch them...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, um... We're at the scene right now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, um... We're at the scene right now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, um... We're at the scene right now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't ASMR. I'm just talking real quietly to not get noticed by monsters...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't ASMR. I'm just talking real quietly to not get noticed by monsters...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't ASMR. I'm just talking real quietly to not get noticed by monsters...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he, I guess I got immersed in this world... I feel like I'm really in the Counterside...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he, I guess I got immersed in this world... I feel like I'm really in the Counterside...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he, I guess I got immersed in this world... I feel like I'm really in the Counterside...

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah. It's the duty of the strong to aid those in danger.94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah. It's the duty of the strong to aid those in danger.94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah. It's the duty of the strong to aid those in danger.94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: Live and die by loyalty! We are the <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Riders Blood Alliance</color>!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Live and die by loyalty! We are the <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Riders Blood Alliance</color>!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Live and die by loyalty! We are the <color=#ffd34c>Freedom Riders Blood Alliance</color>!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. We may not be the strongest in the real world, but we're the strongest party in this game!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. We may not be the strongest in the real world, but we're the strongest party in this game!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. We may not be the strongest in the real world, but we're the strongest party in this game!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can let the grunts do all the hard work while we relax and just watch over them...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can let the grunts do all the hard work while we relax and just watch over them...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can let the grunts do all the hard work while we relax and just watch over them...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think our dreams finally came true!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think our dreams finally came true!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think our dreams finally came true!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, when else would we be able to boss people around like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, when else would we be able to boss people around like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, when else would we be able to boss people around like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's with Lady Xien's money...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's with Lady Xien's money...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's with Lady Xien's money...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! A strong-looking party just appeared!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! A strong-looking party just appeared!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! A strong-looking party just appeared!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But, "Blood Alliance"? They're giving off scary vibes...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But, "Blood Alliance"? They're giving off scary vibes...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But, "Blood Alliance"? They're giving off scary vibes...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... You're Free Riders, right? Would you be willing to participate in an interview?
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... You're Free Riders, right? Would you be willing to participate in an interview?
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... You're Free Riders, right? Would you be willing to participate in an interview?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are called Freedom Riders. When will people start saying our name right...?94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are called Freedom Riders. When will people start saying our name right...?94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are called Freedom Riders. When will people start saying our name right...?94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, you'd better be careful with your words next time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, you'd better be careful with your words next time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, you'd better be careful with your words next time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. So what are you curious to know about us, "Freedom" Riders?
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. So what are you curious to know about us, "Freedom" Riders?
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. So what are you curious to know about us, "Freedom" Riders?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone here in the same party?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone here in the same party?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone here in the same party?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct! It wouldn't be Blood Alliance with only a few elite members, would it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct! It wouldn't be Blood Alliance with only a few elite members, would it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct! It wouldn't be Blood Alliance with only a few elite members, would it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to be scared of the term "Blood Alliance". We're just a big family united by loyalty!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to be scared of the term "Blood Alliance". We're just a big family united by loyalty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to be scared of the term "Blood Alliance". We're just a big family united by loyalty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha ha! I'm a huge fan of yours, Miya!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha ha! I'm a huge fan of yours, Miya!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha ha! I'm a huge fan of yours, Miya!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We haven't found the poster yet, but I'm sure we'll find it in no time with this many people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We haven't found the poster yet, but I'm sure we'll find it in no time with this many people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We haven't found the poster yet, but I'm sure we'll find it in no time with this many people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And, um... could I get your autograph...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And, um... could I get your autograph...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And, um... could I get your autograph...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... I think you'll be a nuisance to the others if you block this area off as a group.
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... I think you'll be a nuisance to the others if you block this area off as a group.
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... I think you'll be a nuisance to the others if you block this area off as a group.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? But it's not against any rules.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? But it's not against any rules.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? But it's not against any rules.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you can't beat them, join them. Isn't that right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you can't beat them, join them. Isn't that right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you can't beat them, join them. Isn't that right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you interested in joining our clan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you interested in joining our clan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you interested in joining our clan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! No, I'm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! No, I'm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! No, I'm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You use grandiose words like Blood Alliance, but in the end, you're just bribing others to join.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You use grandiose words like Blood Alliance, but in the end, you're just bribing others to join.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You use grandiose words like Blood Alliance, but in the end, you're just bribing others to join.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you lack confidence in your skills? What a bunch of losers!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you lack confidence in your skills? What a bunch of losers!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you lack confidence in your skills? What a bunch of losers!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! A challenger just appeared!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! A challenger just appeared!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! A challenger just appeared!

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-bribing?! Don't talk like we're committing some kind of crime!
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-bribing?! Don't talk like we're committing some kind of crime!
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-bribing?! Don't talk like we're committing some kind of crime!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's so bad about having comrades? It's not against the rules.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's so bad about having comrades? It's not against the rules.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's so bad about having comrades? It's not against the rules.

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-of course, it was only possible through Lady Xien's money... but we're not ashamed of anything!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-of course, it was only possible through Lady Xien's money... but we're not ashamed of anything!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course, it was only possible through Lady Xien's money... but we're not ashamed of anything!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. So, you're saying that you're not going to lift a finger, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. So, you're saying that you're not going to lift a finger, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. So, you're saying that you're not going to lift a finger, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you know that only weaklings try to win with quantity?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you know that only weaklings try to win with quantity?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you know that only weaklings try to win with quantity?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How naive. Seems like you're all students of the Academy...94p94p94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: How naive. Seems like you're all students of the Academy...94p94p94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: How naive. Seems like you're all students of the Academy...94p94p94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: While you were all studying comfortably with the Administration's support, we went through all kinds of hardships!
root.m_Talk_DEU: While you were all studying comfortably with the Administration's support, we went through all kinds of hardships!
root.m_Talk_FRA: While you were all studying comfortably with the Administration's support, we went through all kinds of hardships!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The level of experience we have is different!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The level of experience we have is different!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The level of experience we have is different!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Experience, eh? Then, wanna make a bet on who completes the quest first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Experience, eh? Then, wanna make a bet on who completes the quest first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Experience, eh? Then, wanna make a bet on who completes the quest first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think that will provoke us? Why would we want to make a bet with you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think that will provoke us? Why would we want to make a bet with you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think that will provoke us? Why would we want to make a bet with you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I accept your challenge!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I accept your challenge!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I accept your challenge!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whaaat?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whaaat?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whaaat?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Young students trying to overcome an impossible fight... It sparks a flame in my heart...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Young students trying to overcome an impossible fight... It sparks a flame in my heart...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Young students trying to overcome an impossible fight... It sparks a flame in my heart...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah... Finally! I've wanted a heart-pounding battle all this time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah... Finally! I've wanted a heart-pounding battle all this time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah... Finally! I've wanted a heart-pounding battle all this time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't think for a second that I'll go easy on you. The Blood Alliance won't tolerate anyone who messes with our comrades!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't think for a second that I'll go easy on you. The Blood Alliance won't tolerate anyone who messes with our comrades!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't think for a second that I'll go easy on you. The Blood Alliance won't tolerate anyone who messes with our comrades!

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-do whatever you want! We'll be way in the back...
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-do whatever you want! We'll be way in the back...
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-do whatever you want! We'll be way in the back...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah! How can the officials of our alliance stay in the rear?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah! How can the officials of our alliance stay in the rear?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah! How can the officials of our alliance stay in the rear?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The three of us will take the lead! Everyone, follow me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The three of us will take the lead! Everyone, follow me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The three of us will take the lead! Everyone, follow me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oooh...! Lady Xien!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oooh...! Lady Xien!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do we always end up in situations like this?!
